title: Drug Trafficking Organizations
description: Search for documents that name a specific drug trafficking organization and describe the illegal activity (e.g., Colombian cartel exporting cocaine); vague references without organization names are not relevant.

title: Polio Outbreak Overview
description: What are the recent polio outbreak details, medical protections, post‑polio condition reports, and their geographic locations?

title: Hubble Telescope Achievements
description: Which documents demonstrate that the Hubble Telescope's new data has improved quality, expanded our knowledge or disproved previous theories, while excluding reports on shortcomings or repair details?

title: Endangered Mammals
description: Locate documents that identify a mammal as endangered, contain expert disputes about its status, or provide habitat and population data for a mammal recognized elsewhere as endangered.

title: Crashworthiness Comparison
description: Retrieve documents that compare crashworthiness metrics (e.g., fatalities per 100 crashes) of different vehicles, excluding driver-related content.

title: Civilian Deaths Data
description: Locate documents that present specific figures of civilian deaths caused directly or indirectly by armed conflict within a specified area, country, or region.

title: Hydroelectric Projects
description: Locate documents that describe planned or under‑construction hydroelectric projects, detailing their location and any significant changes, while excluding general opinions and unrelated proposals.

title: Dental Implant Evaluation
description: What are the advantages, disadvantages, indications, and cost comparison of dental implants versus other tooth replacement options?

title: Rap Music Teen Impact
description: What psychological studies and evidence demonstrate that rap music has a detrimental effect on teenagers’ behavior, mental health, or lifestyle?

title: Radio Towers Brain Cancer
description: What evidence exists on brain cancer incidence differences between people living near radio towers or using mobile phones versus the general population?

title: Trade Secret Theft
description: Identify documents detailing theft of trade secrets, corporate espionage activities across industries, use of FOIA for private gain, and company counterespionage efforts.

title: Hydroponic Nutrients & Methods
description: Which sources provide comprehensive data on hydroponic nutrients, substrates, experimental methods, history, and benefits compared to soil farming?

title: Maglev commercial use
description: Find documents that discuss commercial applications of magnetic levitation, such as mass‑transit systems, maglev flywheel cars, superconductivity links, and government support plans.

title: Marine Crop Uses
description: Identify the primary food and pharmaceutical applications of marine vegetation and explore other commercial uses such as fertilizer.

title: Unexplained Highway Swerves
description: Find data on highway accidents where the cause cannot be determined, especially cases where one vehicle suddenly swerves into oncoming traffic.

title: Modern Polygamy Prevalence
description: What is the current prevalence and societal attitudes toward polygamy, polyandry, and polygyny worldwide, and what are the historical roots and practical origins of these customs?

title: Junk Fax Cost
description: What is the cost of transmitting junk fax to individuals or businesses, and what laws, regulations, or privacy concerns address or evaluate such transmissions?

title: Retiring Abroad
description: What living conditions and costs should a potential retiree consider when choosing a foreign country to establish a retirement home?

title: Emerging Fuel Research
description: What recent research is being conducted on new fuel sources, which companies are involved, what types of fuels are being explored, and what new developments exist in nuclear fuel processing?

title: FLAG cable construction
description: Provide information on the companies involved in building the FLAG fiber optic system, its landing sites, interconnections with other cables, and any regulatory issues related to its construction or operation.

title: Women in Legislation
description: Which countries mandate a certain percentage of women in their legislatures, which ones have seen decreases or no representation at all, and how does this reflect the global lack of women in politics?

title: Art Fraud Reports
description: Search for reports that identify specific cases of fraud or embezzlement in the international buying or selling of valuable art objects such as paintings, jewelry, and sculptures.

title: Plagiarism Reports
description: Find documents reporting suspected plagiarism in literature, journalism, and academic theses, covering borrowed ideas and concepts without attribution.

title: Argentina-UK Falklands Relations
description: Search for reports detailing the nature of post-1982 interactions—commercial, economic, cultural, diplomatic, or military—between Argentina and the United Kingdom concerning the Falkland Islands, including any direct exchanges or indications of their absence.

title: Cult Member Lifestyles
description: Provide details on the dress, diet, activities, and contributions of members of the specified cult to understand their pursuit of the organization’s ultimate goal.

title: Mass Ferry Sinkings
description: Which ferry sank with 100 or more deaths, and what is its name or the location of the sinking?

title: Current Slavery
description: What evidence shows that slavery is currently practiced in a specific country or city, including information on who is enslaved, who buys or sells them, and for what purposes?

title: Papal Recognition Acts
description: Locate documents that list a person's name and the deeds or actions that earned them recognition by the Pope, with the actions dated by year or period.

title: Mexico City Air Quality
description: What steps has the Mexican government taken to reduce air pollution in Mexico City, such as limiting automobile use, promoting mass transit, and developing new transportation systems?

title: Iraq-Iran Relations
description: Which documents detail cooperation between Iraq and Iran in economic, military, religious, and social areas, border control, minority treatment, sanctions evasion, and the return of aircraft from the Gulf War?

title: World Bank Criticism
description: What documented accusations have been made against the World Bank for being unresponsive to local needs, overly strict, biased toward Western interests, outdated, or having difficult personnel?

title: Tax Evasion Investigations
description: Locate documents on U.S. or foreign investigations of individuals suspected of evading U.S. income tax laws, especially those involving illegal activity proceeds, to support criminal prosecutions.

title: Antibiotic Resistance
description: How and why bacteria resist antibiotics, and what factors drive the rise in resistance?

title: Encryption Export Controls
description: Should the U.S. continue to subject encryption software to export controls, or lift those restrictions to allow global competition?

title: Adoption Rights
description: Find court decisions or procedures that affect the rights of biological parents, adoptive parents, and adopted children, especially where biological parents seek reclamation or contact is barred by sealed orders.

title: Black Bear Attacks
description: What causes black bears to attack humans attracted by food or cosmetics, and what steps can wildlife officials take to reduce their aggression?

title: Hepatitis Treatment & Control
description: What treatments, vaccine research, immune effects, and third‑world control reports are available for hepatitis?

title: Repeated Aspirin Side Effects
description: What adverse effects, such as intestinal bleeding, gastritis, and ulcers, have been reported from repeated aspirin use, and why was the individual taking it?

title: Alzheimer Drug Outcomes
description: Provide information on Alzheimer's disease drugs, their manufacturers, and evidence of their clinical effectiveness or lack thereof.

title: Land Mine Disarmament
description: Identify actions leading to a global treaty banning the production, transfer, and use of land mines, and actions to remove or clean up mined lands.

title: Airport Security Measures
description: What new measures have airports worldwide adopted to improve passenger and baggage screening beyond standard methods following the TWA Flight 800 incident?

title: Diplomatic Spy Incidents
description: Identify cases where diplomats attempted to obtain sensitive information, detailing involved countries, the data sought, and any resulting expulsions.

title: Police Officer Kills
description: Retrieve all documented incidents in which civilian police officers were killed during duty or because of other associations with policing.

title: Paid Email Abuse
description: Find documents expressing a payer’s dissatisfaction with employees misusing their paid email system for non‑work communications.

title: US Tobacco International Sales
description: Find sources that explain why overseas sales of U.S. tobacco products increased or decreased, linking the trend to health findings or aggressive marketing by U.S. companies or their foreign affiliates.

title: International Child Standards
description: Which foreign country has adopted educational standards for children up to age 12, and what specific standards (e.g., computer training, language education) are included?

title: Species Conservation Measures
description: Find the country, endangered species, and conservation steps taken to protect it.

title: Disorder Impact Study
description: Find documents that provide information on a specific physical or mental disorder, including profiles of affected individuals, their professions, the impact of the disorder on their work life, and the strategies they use to cope.

title: Metabolic Pathways
description: What are the key catabolic and anabolic reactions in metabolic pathways, including glycolysis, the Krebs cycle, and related disorders?

title: Computer Work Injuries
description: What is the prevalence of and what mitigation strategies exist for physical disorders associated with frequent computer terminal use?

description: Find documents that discuss petroleum exploration activities near the Falkland Islands in the South Atlantic, excluding references to continental South America.

description: Find documents about scientific explorations of Antarctica, future research plans, and policies banning mineral mining, while excluding tourism and generic experiment disruptions.

title: Fund Rankings

title: Drug Legalization Benefits

title: Mass Human Smuggling
description: Find reports of incidents where at least ten people were smuggled for profit, with uncertain or mixed participation of the smuggled.

title: Tunnel Disaster

title: El Nino Phenomena

description: Retrieve documents detailing piracy on any body of water, while excluding legal national seizures and non-boarding fishing disputes.

title: Government Encryption Access
description: Identify documents that describe governmental access into encryption systems for counter‑intelligence or anti‑crime purposes.

title: Nobel Prize Recipients
description: Retrieve documents that list the Nobel Prize award year, field of study, and recipient name; for announcements of a current award, the year may be omitted.

description: Search for documents that explain the reasons for a withdrawal, rather than merely reporting that the withdrawal occurred.

title: Greenpeace Prosecutions
description: Identify documents detailing arrests and prosecutions of Greenpeace members or the organization for its actions.

title: Olympic Training Conditions
description: Identify the training conditions, sites, and requirements for athletes preparing for the Olympic Games while excluding individual competitor stories or general Olympic coverage.

title: Poppy Export History
description: What historical documents describe the cultivation of poppies for export and the development of the poppy industry?

title: Tower Condition Assessment
description: Locate documents that discuss the current condition of the tower, describe reinforcement measures taken, and provide measurements reflecting changes in the tower.

title: Child Divorce Impact
description: What are the economic and emotional effects of divorce on children?

title: Court Adoption
description: Obtain documents that explicitly discuss court-sanctioned adoptions, excluding personal narratives.

title: Spanish in Schools Impact
description: Find documents that explain how the use of Spanish in schools improves the lives of Spanish‑speaking immigrants, excluding documents that only mention Spanish.

title: Wind Power Locations
description: Where are specific wind power installations located?

title: Adult Immigrant English Programs
description: Identify descriptions or proposals for programs that teach English to adult immigrants, excluding testing programs and programs targeting only children.

title: Pre-Breakup Maneuvers
description: Identify the actions taken by the two parties before their partnership ended.

title: Part-Time Benefits
description: Identify documents that describe current benefits specifically for part-time workers.

title: Oscars Voting Process
description: Explain how Oscar winners are selected, the nomination methods, voter eligibility rules, and the number of eligible voters.

title: Peso Dollar Peg Problems
description: Identify the economic problems that have arisen due to the Argentine peso being pegged to the US dollar.

title: NI Major Employers
description: Find documents that name at least one major employer or industry in Northern Ireland, excluding coverage of unemployment or industrial closures.

title: International Media Bias
description: Identify allegations or evidence of bias in the media of countries other than the United States.

title: U.S. Family Planning Aid
description: Which countries received U.S. aid for family planning, and why was such aid denied or refused in certain cases?

title: College Job Advantage
description: Identify documents that provide evidence of the advantages of a college education for employment opportunities, while excluding documents that highlight better opportunities for non-college vocational training.

title: Clear-Cutting Resistance
description: Identify the reasons people or groups oppose the practice of clear‑cutting forests.

title: Prostate Cancer Treatments
description: Which treatment modalities are available for prostate cancer, excluding benign prostate enlargement (BPH) and individual-specific cases?

title: Electronic Media Impact
description: Find evidence that explicitly attributes effects such as declining readership to electronic media.

title: Compost Heap Methods
description: How can a compost heap be built and maintained, including guidance on dimensions, depth, contents, and care?

title: White Collar Sentences
description: Which documents specify the sentence imposed for a white‑collar crime?

title: Cosmetic Procedure Safety
description: What safety issues are associated with elective cosmetic procedures for body image enhancement?

title: U.S. Controllers Pay
description: What are the working conditions and pay for American air traffic controllers?

title: Literacy Rate Africa
description: What is the literacy rate in an African country?

title: Term Limits Value
description: Find opinions on the value of term limits that include reasons supporting or critiquing the stance.

title: Gasoline Taxes Debate
description: Identify arguments for and against increasing gasoline taxes in the U.S., while excluding any discussion of gasoline price fluctuations.
